title: phillyrea latifolia f. ilicifolia
intro: Phillyrea latifolia f. ilicifolia, also known as the Holly-leaved Phillyrea, is a deciduous shrub or small tree in the family Oleaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Phillyrea latifolia f. ilicifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or infused oil, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
